title: Timmy, the whale stranded off Germany's coast, swims off and gets stuck...again
content: The plan was to lift the whale from the seabed using inflatable cushions and transport it with pontoons back to the North Sea or possibly as far as the Atlantic Ocean.

title: Pope Leo XIV heads to shrine in Angola that was a center of African slave trade
